steps.title: Identify the museum focus
steps.content: The text introduces the Walt Whitman House, explains that it is now a museum dedicated to Whitman's life and writings, and describes exhibits that help visitors connect with him.

steps.title: Reject narrower purposes
steps.content: Choice B focuses on why readers enjoy Whitman's works, which the text does not explain. Choice C is too broad because the passage does not summarize Whitman's whole biography. Choice D invents a museum comparison. The answer is A.
